description_long: This electric drill features a robust, angular body with a combination of matte black and metallic gold finishes, giving it a modern and professional appearance. The main body is elongated, with a prominent cylindrical barrel at the front, likely housing the motor and drill mechanism. A large, ergonomic handle with a visible trigger is positioned beneath the main body, designed for comfortable grip and control. The rear section includes a stock-like extension, which may provide additional stability during use. A detailed scope or sighting device is mounted on top, suggesting precision work or alignment capabilities. The drill bit at the front is slender and metallic, suitable for standard drilling tasks.
description: A modern electric drill with a black and gold body, ergonomic handle, and a mounted scope for precision. Features a slender metallic drill bit and a stock-like rear extension.
description_view_0: Front view showing the narrow profile, with the drill bit and barrel directly facing forward.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the full length, ergonomic handle, mounted scope, and stock-like rear extension.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the stock and the alignment of the handle and scope.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the handle, scope, and drill bit from the other side.
